news.summary: A prominent cryptocurrency analyst has suggested that Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) may be on the verge of a significant movement that could ignite a surge in the altcoin market. The analyst, Kevin, highlighted in a podcast on May 14 that various technical indicators and positive macroeconomic trends are indicating a potential bullish scenario. Pointing out that Bitcoin is facing resistance at $106,800 (1.272 Fibonacci extension level), Kevin noted a simultaneous decline in BTC dominance along with a decrease in USDT dominance. This particular combination in the past has signaled upcoming rallies in alternative cryptocurrencies. The analyst emphasized the importance of current macroeconomic conditions, such as strong labor data, consistent GDP growth, and decreasing inflation, in supporting this outlook. For more details, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Bitcoin's resistance at $106,800 and declining dominance could trigger an altcoin rally, supported by improving macroeconomic trends.

news.summary: A company has seen a significant 120% rise in its battery recycling throughput as it speeds up its commercial activities focused on boosting the domestic manufacturing of critical minerals.
news.headline: American Battery Technology triples quarterly revenue, reports 120% increase in battery recycling throughput. Aim to boost domestic mineral manufacturing.

news.summary: On Friday, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline in anticipation of critical inflation figures. Applied Materials, a supplier for Nvidia, saw a significant drop in stock value following its earnings report. The market reaction to this news was keenly observed by investors and analysts. The Dow Jones index fell as investors awaited key inflation data, while Applied Materials, a supplier for Nvidia, faced a plunge in its stock performance post the earnings report.
news.headline: Dow Jones falls before inflation data, Nvidia supplier plunges on earnings, Applied Materials dives.

news.summary: On Friday, Top Win International Limited (NASDAQ: TOPW) revealed its intention to venture into the digital asset market by collaborating with Sora Ventures. The company, based in Hong Kong, will also undergo a rebrand as "AsiaStrategy," subject to approval from shareholders and regulators. With Asia increasingly becoming a center for Web3 development, TopWin aims to benefit from this trend by implementing a treasury strategy backed by Bitcoin. This move will involve tapping into the knowledge and skills of Sora Ventures. The full article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Top Win (NASDAQ: TOPW) partnering with Sora Ventures to enter digital asset market, rebrand as "AsiaStrategy."

news.summary: A base shelf prospectus has been made available for public access, with a prospectus supplement to be accessible within two business days following the announcement of the offering on SEDAR. This allows investors to review important information about the offering promptly.
news.headline: TerraVest Industries Inc. raises bought deal offering of common shares from $240M to $279M. Prospectus available within 2 days on SEDAR.

news.summary: James (Josh) Wilson, a partner specializing in securities litigation at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who incurred substantial losses in Compass to reach out to him directly for a consultation on their potential legal avenues. If you have experienced significant losses in Krispy Kreme stock or options and wish to explore your options in this regard, Wilson is available for direct contact to discuss potential strategies for seeking recourse.
news.headline: Law firm Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP investigates claims for Krispy Kreme investors. Contact James Wilson if you suffered significant losses.

news.summary: Bitcoin treasury companies like Michael Saylor's Strategy Inc. were warned by Brett Winton of ARK Investment Management about potential trouble ahead. These companies, like MSTR, have been raising funds through equity and debt for Bitcoin purchases. Winton believes this strategy is risky, as funding purchases with debt could lead to disaster in the long run. MSTR holds 568,840 Bitcoins valued at $39.41 billion, with a market cap of $108.55 billion. Winton suggests that as long as stock prices trade at a premium to the net asset value, companies may continue issuing equity to exploit this arbitrage. He warns that competitors entering the market could accelerate this process, potentially leading to difficulties for BTC treasury companies.
news.headline: ARK Invest's Brett Winton criticizes Bitcoin treasury companies like MSTR for risky debt-funded purchases, citing potential disaster. MSTR holds 568,840 Bitcoins worth $39.41 billion with a market cap of $108.55 billion. Treasury companies may issue more equity until arbitrage opportunity closes.
Meanwhile from Trump on Truth Social Has anyone noticed that, since I said “I HATE TAYLOR SWIFT,” she’s no longer “HOT?”

news.summary: Home Depot, Inc. is set to release its first-quarter earnings on May 20. Analysts project earnings of $3.59 per share, a slight decrease from $3.63 per share the previous year. Revenue is expected to be around $39.14 billion, up from $36.42 billion in the same period last year. Wells Fargo analyst Zachary Fadem maintains an Overweight rating on Home Depot, with a price target now at $420, reduced from $445. The company offers an annual dividend yield of 2.43%, with a quarterly dividend of $2.30 per share ($9.20 annually). Investors are keeping an eye on potential gains.
news.headline: Home Depot (NYSE: HD) Q1 earnings on May 20 expected at $3.59/share, revenue $39.14 billion, dividend yield of 2.43%.

news.summary: In Brentwood, United Kingdom, on May 16, 2025, it was reported that Mr. William Philip Richards, through his private investment holding corporations - RAB Capital Holdings Limited, Eagles Trust Limited, and RAB Special Situations (Master) Fund Limited - collectively known as the “Reporter," sold a total of 9,061,168 Common Shares of Black Iron Inc. (BKI:TSX) in the open market. This transaction, conducted between January 10, 2025, and May 14, 2025, resulted in an aggregate consideration of $1,536,808. The shares were sold at an average price of $0.1699 per common share.
news.headline: RAB Capital Holdings sells 9,061,168 Common Shares of Black Iron Inc. for $1,536,808, averaging $0.1699 per share.

news.summary: A fiber-optic expansion project costing nearly $13.3 million has been completed by Kinetic, a top provider of fiber internet for homes and businesses, in collaboration with Thomas County. The upgraded internet access has been activated, benefiting numerous residents in Barwick, Boston, Coolidge, Meigs, Ochlocknee, Thomasville, and parts of Pavo. Leaders from Kinetic and Thomas County gathered to commemorate the successful implementation of the project which addresses the growing demand for high-speed internet in today's rapidly evolving digital landscape.
news.headline: 1,600 Thomas County residents can now access Kinetic Fiber Internet after a $13.3 million project completion.

news.summary: A new line of ProCreator Series monitors was introduced by Acer in Taipei on May 16, 2025. These monitors are equipped with Calman-verified, high-resolution displays to improve creative workflows. In addition to this, Acer also launched portable monitors and compact LED projectors. The ProCreator Series monitors boast wide color gamut, providing vivid and accurate colors for professionals. These innovations aim to cater to the growing demands of creative industries.
news.headline: Acer debuts ProCreator Series Monitors with Calman verification; also unveils LED projectors; May 16, 2025.

news.summary: In a recent development in Toronto on May 16, 2025, Visionary has made strides in early cancer screening and home self-testing technologies, drawing considerable interest from the sector. One of Visionary's subsidiaries, American Precision Biotech Inc., played a key role in this advancement. The innovation has sparked widespread industry attention, highlighting the increasing importance of accessible and efficient healthcare solutions.
news.headline: Visionary pioneers new cancer screening tech on May 16, 2025. Breakthrough in self-testing tech attracts industry attention.

news.summary: MediPharm is facing a critical cash shortage with a looming risk of running out of funds by November. The company experienced a significant loss of $3.3 million in Q1 of 2025. However, management has not provided a concrete strategy to attain profitability or a commitment to minimize wastage and extravagant expenses. The situation calls for urgent and substantial changes to secure the future of the company.
news.headline: Apollo Capital warns MediPharm shareholders of insolvency risk due to losses of $3.3 million in Q1 2025. Cash running out by November unless changes made.

news.summary: In Dublin, a new report titled "Protein Alternative Market - Focused Insights 2025-2030" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The Protein Alternative Market, valued at USD 21.76 billion in 2024, is expected to reach USD 36.17 billion by 2030, with a projected compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 8.84%. The global population is estimated to increase to 8.5 billion by 2030, according to the United Nations, highlighting the necessity for creative food production solutions to meet the growing demand.
news.headline: Protein Alternative Market to reach USD 36.17 billion by 2030, with a CAGR of 8.84% due to rising global population.

news.summary: Bojangles, located in Charlotte, N.C., is introducing a new Limited-Time Offer for the summer season - Watermelon Sweet Tea. Their popular Legendary Iced Tea is combined with real watermelon juice to create a refreshing twist on a classic beverage. This new drink is perfect for summer road trips, afternoon refreshments, or enjoying alongside Bojangles' menu favorites. The release of Watermelon Sweet Tea is accompanied by a special promotion - details to be announced.
news.headline: Bojangles launches Watermelon Sweet Tea for summer, blending its Legendary Iced Tea with real watermelon juice.

news.summary: Sleep Number Corporation (Nasdaq: SNBR) revealed the grant of equity awards on May 15, 2025, to attract its new Executive Vice President and Chief Marketing Officer, Amber Minson. As of her appointment on May 5, 2025, Minson received inducement awards including 21,724 shares. This move was made to secure Minson's commitment and contribution to the company in her new role. The awards were granted to facilitate Minson's employment and to ensure her alignment with Sleep Number's goals.
news.headline: Sleep Number granted 21,724 equity awards to Chief Marketing Officer, Amber Minson, under Nasdaq Rule.

news.summary: On May 13, 2025, LHV Group has confirmed the acquisition of its own shares on the Nasdaq Tallinn Stock Exchange.
news.headline: LHV Group acquires its own shares on Nasdaq Tallinn Stock Exchange on 13 May 2025. Key numbers not provided.
